pricing.reasoning: Based on the past event data, the target audience is 500 people, and the topic is Large Language Models, which is a specialized and high-demand field. The past event had 5,000+ attendees, world-class speakers, and 10+ organizations represented, indicating a high level of interest and demand. The ticket prices are set accordingly, with early bird prices starting at 14,999 INR, general prices at 24,999 INR, and VIP prices at 49,999 INR, considering the value proposition of the event and the expected attendance.

venues.name: The Seamless NCUI Auditorium
venues.why: Ample parking and full power backup

venues.name: JW Marriott Mumbai Sahar
venues.why: Luxury indoor convention spaces and proximity to business hubs

venues.name: Conference Rooms in Delhi
venues.why: Variety of options with a starting price of Rs 400 per person

gtm.promotion_message: Join India's largest AI conference to explore the future of Large Language Models! Learn from world-class speakers, network with 5,000+ AI leaders, and discover the latest advancements in AI. Get your pass now!

final_plan.summary: India's largest AI conference to explore Large Language Models, featuring world-class speakers and 500+ attendees, with ticket prices starting at 14,999 INR. The conference will be held at a luxury venue in Delhi, with ample parking and full power backup. Promote the event through Discord, LinkedIn, and Twitter to reach 5,000+ AI leaders.
final_plan.gtm_tip: Promote the event through LinkedIn, Twitter, and Discord communities, such as Machine Learning, AI India, and Large Language Models, to reach the target audience of AI leaders and professionals.
